title: Add schema 0.7 new block fixture canary
instructions: Add one tests-only canary in tests/unit/zod-plan-schema.spec.ts proving schema_version 0.7 accepts the five W8 C4 new document block types: philosophy_banner, inbody_recap, weekly_overview, daily_session_detail, and evening_routine. Do not modify production code or schema code. Keep the change minimal by extending the existing baseValidPlan fixture or creating a small cloned valid plan in the test. Also create the required Codex completion report at 03 Prompts/(C) 2026-05-03 codex-omht-schema-07-new-block-fixture-canary-report.md. Run only the listed verify commands. Create exactly one commit with the requested subject. Do not push.
expectedCommitSubject: test(w8): add schema 0.7 new block fixture canary
